title: Costco Guys
description: A small texture pack that changes the minecraft totem to a cookie based off a joke tweet.
body:
I made this as a joke based off [this tweet](https://x.com/chumblings/status/1819744691224506858). Should work on most versions I just made it in 1.20.2 lol.

Current Changes
- Replaces Totem of Undying with "Totem of Uncrumbling" with a new texture and activation sound

Planned Changes
- Replace Golden Carrot with Chicken Bake
- Replace Dried Kelp with Samplers
- Replace Raw Beef with 13 and a half pounds of meat
- Replace one of the 2x1 long paintings with a Costco TV
- Replace Ender Pearl with that weird blue star thing
- Replace a music disc with the audio from the video
- Replace Cooked Beef with Costco Pizza
- Replace Cooked Pork with Costco Hotdog
- Replace ender dragon with that weird inflatable from the video (heavy maybe since this is my first pack I've ever released)
